title: Robinhood Markets Revenue 2020-2026
text: Historical revenue trends for Robinhood Markets from 2020 through 2026 demonstrate exceptional growth trajectory. Revenue Timeline: 2020: Company IPO year with relatively modest baseline revenues. 2021: Strong growth as retail trading boom drove platform expansion. 2022: Revenue of $1.358 billion reflecting moderating growth from 2021 peak. 2023: Revenue of $1.865 billion, representing 37.33% increase from 2022. 2024: Revenue of $2.951 billion, representing 58.23% increase from 2023. 2025: Record revenues of approximately $4.5 billion, representing 52%+ growth from 2024. Growth Analysis: The company demonstrated strong recovery from 2022 slowdown with accelerating growth trajectory through 2024-2025. Q4 2024 and full year 2025 results represented record revenue achievement. Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR): From 2022 through 2025, Robinhood achieved approximately 40% revenue CAGR. Key Drivers: Expansion of trading products (crypto, options, futures, prediction markets). Growth in Gold subscription revenues. Regulatory tailwinds and market cycles. Product innovation and market share gains in retail trading.
